entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop targeted by various insect pests.

entities.name: SHOOTFLY
entities.description: An insect pest that causes grain production losses in sorghum.

entities.name: STEM BORERS
entities.description: Insect pests that cause grain production losses in sorghum.

entities.name: SORGHUM MIDGE
entities.description: An insect pest that causes grain production losses in sorghum.

entities.name: HEAD BUGS
entities.description: Insect pests that cause grain production losses in sorghum.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum production is affected by insect pests.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: A continent where sorghum production is affected by insect pests.

entities.name: INTEGRATED PEST MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A strategy for managing insect pests in crops.

entities.name: CHEMICAL INSECTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents used to control insect pests in sorghum production.

entities.name: SUB-SAHARAN AFRICA
entities.description: A region where chemical insecticides have limited scope in sorghum production.

entities.name: INTERCROPPING CONFIGURATIONS
entities.description: A cultural method of planting different crops together to manage pests.

entities.name: BIOCONTROL
entities.description: A biological method used to manage insect pests.

entities.name: INSECT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to withstand attack by insect pests.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional breeding techniques used to develop insect-resistant sorghum.

entities.name: BIOTECHNOLOGICAL APPROACHES
entities.description: Modern scientific techniques used to achieve higher levels of insect resistance in sorghum.

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method that uses genetic markers to speed up the selection process.

entities.name: GENE PYRAMIDING
entities.description: The process of combining multiple resistance genes into a single variety.

entities.name: RESISTANCE GENES
entities.description: Genes that provide resistance to insect pests.

entities.name: WILD RELATIVES OF SORGHUM
entities.description: Non-domesticated sorghum species that may possess resistance genes.

entities.name: GENETIC ENGINEERING
entities.description: The direct manipulation of an organism's genes using biotechnology.

entities.name: TRANSFORMATION
entities.description: The process of introducing foreign genetic material into a cell.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where transformation protocols are being standardized.

entities.name: BIOSAFETY
entities.description: The set of measures to manage risks associated with biotechnology.
